    Service responsible for orchestrating the music file import process.

    A functional interface for callbacks that accept three arguments.

    invalidate(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.AnalyticsCacheService
    Removes a single key from the cache.
    invalidateAll() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.AnalyticsCacheService
    Clears the entire cache.
    isEmpty() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Returns true if the list contains no elements.

    isLockedOut(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
    Returns whether the given username is currently locked out.

    isSongInPlaylist(Long, Song) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(n) where n = songs in playlist (list.contains) Space Complexity: O(1)
    isValidPlay(Integer) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.PlaybackConstants
    Validates whether a recorded play duration should be counted in analytics.
